commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Google Chat approval-card text truncation through the shared UTF-16-safe text helper and adds surrogate-boundary regression tests.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +64. Total +65 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source plus contributor proof: current main and v2026.6.10 slice Google Chat approval-card text with raw UTF-16 indexing, and the PR body demonstrates the lone-surrogate boundary against the real approval runtime. I did not run a local repro because this review was read-only.
